mapper.select: SELECT C.ICKEY AS FIELD1 ,C.ICNAME AS FIELD2 ,F.OWNM AS FIELD3 ,MIN(C.UOM) AS FIELD4 ,A.PRODUCTLOT AS FIELD5 ,A.ATTRIBUTE3 AS FIELD6 ,SUM(B.HOQTY) AS FIELD7 ,SUM(B.TTQTY) AS FIELD8

SELECT A.UPDATEURKEY ,A.UPDATEDATE ,A.INSERTURKEY ,A.INSERTDATE ,A.OWKEY ,A.ICKEY ,A.CTKEY ,B.CTNM FROM TADMIN_MST_ICXCT A INNER JOIN TADMIN_MST_CT B ON A.CTKEY = B.CTKEY WHERE A.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND A.ICKEY = #{ickey}
SELECT COUNT(1)
SELECT COUNT(1)
SELECT COUNT(1)
SELECT ACKEY FIELD1 ,ACNM FIELD2 ,OWKEY FIELD3
mapper.sql: WITH T_ROLE AS ( SELECT D.ROKEY FROM TADMIN_MST_UR A INNER JOIN TADMIN_MST_URGR B ON B.URGRKEY = A.URGRKEY INNER JOIN TADMIN_MST_URGRXROGT C ON C.URGRKEY = B.URGRKEY INNER JOIN TADMIN_MST_RO D ON D.ROKEY = C.ROKEY WHERE A.DELYN = 'N' AND A.URKEY = #{surkey} ), T_ROLE_CT AS ( SELECT DISTINCT B.CTKEY FROM TADMIN_MST_ROXCTGT A INNER JOIN TADMIN_MST_CT B ON A.CTKEY = B.CTKEY WHERE B.DELYN = 'N' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM T_ROLE WHERE ROKEY = A.ROKEY ) )

WITH T_ROLE AS ( SELECT D.ROKEY FROM TADMIN_MST_UR A INNER JOIN TADMIN_MST_URGR B ON B.URGRKEY = A.URGRKEY INNER JOIN TADMIN_MST_URGRXROGT C ON C.URGRKEY = B.URGRKEY INNER JOIN TADMIN_MST_RO D ON D.ROKEY = C.ROKEY WHERE A.DELYN = 'N' AND A.URKEY = #{surkey} ), T_ROLE_OW AS ( SELECT DISTINCT A.OWKEY FROM TADMIN_MST_ROXOWGT A INNER JOIN TADMIN_MST_CT B ON A.CTKEY = B.CTKEY INNER JOIN TADMIN_MST_OW C ON A.OWKEY = C.OWKEY WHERE B.DELYN = 'N' AND C.DELYN = 'N' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM T_ROLE WHERE ROKEY = A.ROKEY ) )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1)
SELECT OWKEY FIELD1 ,OWNM FIELD2
mapper.sql:
FROM TORDER_MST_CT A -- 센터코드 LEFT OUTER JOIN TORDER_MST_COM_DT B ON B.COMHDKEY ='CTTYPE' AND A.CTTYPE = B.COMDTKEY AND B.LAKEY = #{lakey} WHERE A.CLOSDATE >= #{sysdate} AND A.MANAGEMENTYN = 'Y' AND A.DELYN = 'N'
AND A.CTKEY IN
#{CTKEY_SELECTION_VALUE}
AND (A.CTKEY LIKE '%'|| #{value} || '%' OR A.CTNM LIKE '%'|| #{value} || '%' OR A.CTTYPE LIKE '%'|| #{value} || '%' OR A.CNTRYCD LIKE '%'|| #{value} || '%' OR A.CLOSDATE LIKE '%'|| #{value} || '%')
AND (A.CTKEY LIKE '%'|| #{popParam} || '%' OR A.CTNM LIKE '%'|| #{popParam} || '%')
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1)
SELECT A.CTKEY FIELD1 ,A.CTNM FIELD2 ,B.COMDTNM FIELD3 ,A.CNTRYCD FIELD4 ,A.CLOSDATE FIELD5
SELECT COUNT(1)
SELECT A.CTKEY FIELD1 ,A.CTNM FIELD2 ,B.OWKEY FIELD3 ,C.COMDTNM FIELD4 ,A.CNTRYCD FIELD5 ,A.CLOSDATE FIELD6
SELECT COUNT(1)
SELECT ICGRPKEY AS FIELD1 ,ICGRPNM AS FIELD2 ,ICGRPTYPE AS FIELD3 ,'ICGRTYPE' || ';' || ICGRPTYPE AS FIELD3_DESC ,OWKEY AS FIELD4
SELECT COUNT(1)
SELECT A.ICUNITKEY AS FIELD1 ,B.ICUNITTYPE AS FIELD2 ,B.ICUNITQTY AS FIELD3 ,A.OWKEY AS FIELD4
/* oms-common-sql-oracle.xml - selectTOrderMstIcCount */ SELECT COUNT(1)
SELECT A.ICKEY AS FIELD1 , A.ICNM AS FIELD2 , A.OWKEY AS FIELD3 , A.ICUNITKEY AS FIELD4 , A.SLPRC AS FIELD5 , A.UDF2 AS FIELD6
SELECT COUNT(1)

SELECT DISTINCT A.ICKEY AS FIELD1 ,A.ICNM AS FIELD2 ,A.OWKEY AS FIELD3 ,A.ICUNITKEY AS FIELD4 ,A.UOM AS FIELD5 ,'ICUTTYPE' ||';'|| A.UOM AS FIELD5_DESC ,B.LOGGRPCD AS FIELD6 ,'LOGGRPCD' ||';'|| B.LOGGRPCD AS FIELD6_DESC ,COALESCE(SUM(D.AVQTY), 0) AS FIELD7 ,COALESCE(SUM(D.TTQTY), 0) AS FIELD8
SELECT COUNT(1)
SELECT SBKEY AS FIELD1 ,ICKEY AS FIELD2 ,OWKEY AS FIELD3 ,ICUNITTYPE AS FIELD4 ,'ICUTTYPE' ||';'|| ICUNITTYPE AS FIELD4_DESC

SELECT ORCSKEY AS FIELD1 ,ORCSNAME AS FIELD2 FROM TORDER_SET_ORCS
WHERE (ORCSKEY LIKE '%' || #{value} || '%' OR ORCSNAME LIKE '%' || #{value} || '%')
SELECT COUNT(1)
SELECT ZIP_NO AS FIELD1 ,SIDO_ADDR AS FIELD2 ,SKK_ADDR AS FIELD3 ,DONG_ADDR AS FIELD4 ,DLCOMPANY AS FIELD5 ,'DLCOMPANY'||';'||DLCOMPANY AS FIELD5_DESC
SELECT COUNT(1)
SELECT ICUNITTYPE FIELD1 ,'ICUTTYPE' ||';'|| ICUNITTYPE AS FIELD1_DESC ,ICUNITQTY FIELD2
mapper.sql:
FROM TORDER_MST_ORCD_HD A
AND A.DELYN = 'N'
AND (A.ORDERCOMHDKEY LIKE '%' || #{value} || '%' OR A.ORDERCOMHNM LIKE '%' || #{value} || '%')
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1)

SELECT A.ORDERCOMHDKEY AS FIELD1, A.ORDERCOMHNM AS FIELD2 /* CASE B.ORDERCOMDTNM WHEN B.ORDERCOMDTNM IS NULL THEN A.ORDERCOMHNM ELSE B.ORDERCOMDTNM END AS FIELD3, B.ORDERCOMDTKEY AS FIELD4, B.ORDERCOMDTVAL AS FIELD5 */
mapper.sql:
FROM TADMIN_MST_EQ WHERE CLOSDATE >= #{sysdate}
AND (EQKEY LIKE '%' || #{value} || '%')
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1)
SELECT EQKEY AS FIELD1 ,EQTYPE AS FIELD2 ,'EQTYPE' ||';'|| EQTYPE AS FIELD2_DESC
SELECT COUNT(1)
SELECT ICMPKEY AS FIELD1 ,OWKEY AS FIELD2
mapper.sql:
FROM TADMIN_MST_STORE WHERE CLOSDATE >= #{sysdate} AND DELYN = 'N' AND STORETYPE = '0'
AND (STOREKEY LIKE '%' || #{value} || '%' OR STORENM LIKE '%'|| #{value} || '%' )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1)
SELECT STOREKEY FIELD1 ,STORENM FIELD2
mapper.sql:
FROM TADMIN_MST_ADDR_T WHERE DELYN = 'N'
AND (ADDRID LIKE '%' || #{value} || '%' OR CTYNM LIKE '%'|| #{value} || '%' OR STNM LIKE '%'|| #{value} || '%' OR UNIT LIKE '%'|| #{value} || '%' OR ZIPCD LIKE '%'|| #{value} || '%')
AND OWKEY IN
#{OWKEY_SELECTION_VALUE}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1)
SELECT ADDRID FIELD1 ,CTYNM FIELD2 ,STNM FIELD3 ,UNIT FIELD4 ,ZIPCD FIELD5
SELECT COUNT (1)
SELECT A.SETICKEY FIELD1, A.ICKEY FIELD2, B.ICNM FIELD3, A.OWKEY FIELD4, B.UOM FIELD5 , 'ICUTTYPE' ||';'|| B.UOM AS FIELD5_DESC, A.ICUNITKEY FIELD6, A.CLOSDATE FIELD7
mapper.sql:
FROM TORDER_MST_POGRP WHERE DELYN = 'N'
AND ( POGRPKEY LIKE '%' || #{value} || '%' OR POGRPNAME LIKE '%'|| #{value} || '%' OR OWKEY LIKE '%'|| #{value} || '%' )
AND OWKEY IN
#{OWKEY_SELECTION_VALUE}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT (1)
SELECT POGRPKEY FIELD1, POGRPNAME FIELD2, OWKEY FIELD3
SELECT COUNT(1)

SELECT A.ICKEY AS FIELD1, B.ICNM AS FIELD2, A.OWKEY AS FIELD3, A.CTKEY AS FIELD4, B.ICUNITKEY AS FIELD5, B.UOM AS FIELD6, 'ICUTTYPE' || ';' || B.UOM AS FIELD6_DESC, C.CTNM AS FIELD7, A.CP AS FIELD8, A.ICGRPKEY AS FIELD9, B.SPEC AS FIELD10, A.LOGGRPCD AS FIELD11, A.RNDKEY AS FIELD12
SELECT COUNT(1)
SELECT A.STOREKEY FIELD1 ,B.STORENM FIELD2 ,A.CTKEY FIELD3
mapper.sql:
FROM TORDER_MST_ORCD_HD TB1 INNER JOIN TORDER_MST_ORCD_DT TB2 ON TB1.ORDERCOMHDKEY = TB2.ORDERCOMHDKEY WHERE TB1.ORDERCOMHDKEY = 'OM_MT_CT_MOVE_RSN'
AND TB2.LAKEY = #{lakey}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1)

#{GRIDPAGING_ROWNUMTYPE_TOP} SELECT TB2.ORDERCOMDTKEY AS FIELD1 ,TB2.ORDERCOMDTNM AS FIELD2
ORDER BY #{colName} DESC
ORDER BY #{colName} ASC
ORDER BY FIELD1 ASC
#{GRIDPAGING_ROWNUMTYPE_BOTTOM}
SELECT COUNT(*) AS CNT
SELECT DISTINCT CTGKEY FIELD1 --,CTGLV FIELD2 ,CTGNM FIELD2
mapper.sql:
FROM ( SELECT REPACKEY AS ACKEY ,OWKEY FROM TADMIN_MST_AC GROUP BY REPACKEY, OWKEY ) A INNER JOIN TADMIN_MST_AC B ON A.ACKEY = B.ACKEY AND A.OWKEY = B.OWKEY WHERE 1 = 1
AND (B.ACKEY LIKE '%'|| #{value} || '%' OR B.ACNM LIKE '%'|| #{value} || '%' OR B.ACNM LIKE '%'|| #{value} || '%')
AND A.OWKEY IN
#{OWKEY_SELECTION_VALUE}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1)
SELECT B.ACKEY AS FIELD1 ,B.ACNM AS FIELD2 ,B.ACTYPE AS FIELD3 ,A.OWKEY AS FIELD4 ,'ACTYPE' || ';' || B.ACTYPE AS FIELD3_DESC
SELECT COUNT(1)

#{GRIDPAGING_ROWNUMTYPE_TOP} SELECT ICKEY AS FIELD1, ICNM AS FIELD2, ACKEY AS FIELD3, ACNM AS FIELD4, CTKEY AS FIELD5, OWKEY AS FIELD6
ORDER BY OWKEY, ICKEY, ACKEY #{GRIDPAGING_ROWNUMTYPE_BOTTOM}
mapper.sql:
FROM ( SELECT A.OWKEY, A.ACKEY, A.ICKEY, B.ICNM, C.ACNM FROM TADMIN_MST_CTXACXIC A INNER JOIN TADMIN_MST_IC B ON A.OWKEY = B.OWKEY AND A.ICKEY = B.ICKEY INNER JOIN TADMIN_MST_AC C ON A.ACKEY = C.ACKEY AND A.OWKEY = C.OWKEY GROUP BY A.OWKEY, A.ACKEY, A.ICKEY, B.ICNM, C.ACNM ) WHERE 1 = 1
AND OWKEY IN
#{OWKEY_SELECTION_VALUE}
AND ( ACKEY LIKE '#{value}' || '%' OR ICKEY LIKE '#{value}' || '%' OR ICNM LIKE '%' || '#{value}' || '%' OR ACNM LIKE '%' || '#{value}' || '%' )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1)

#{GRIDPAGING_ROWNUMTYPE_TOP} SELECT ICKEY AS FIELD1, ICNM AS FIELD2, ACKEY AS FIELD3, ACNM AS FIELD4, OWKEY AS FIELD5
ORDER BY OWKEY, ICKEY, ACKEY #{GRIDPAGING_ROWNUMTYPE_BOTTOM}
mapper.sql:
FROM TADMIN_MST_IC WHERE 1 = 1
AND OWKEY IN
#{OWKEY_SELECTION_VALUE}
AND ICKEY = '#{value}'
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1)
SELECT ICKEY AS FIELD1, ICNM AS FIELD2
SELECT COUNT(1)
SELECT CTGKEY FIELD1 ,CTGLEVEL FIELD2 ,CTGNAME FIELD3
mapper.sql:
FROM TORDER_MST_ORCD_HD TB1 INNER JOIN TORDER_MST_ORCD_DT TB2 ON TB1.ORDERCOMHDKEY = TB2.ORDERCOMHDKEY WHERE TB1.ORDERCOMHDKEY = 'OM_INV_TYPE_CHG'
AND TB2.LAKEY = #{lakey}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1)

#{GRIDPAGING_ROWNUMTYPE_TOP} SELECT TB2.ORDERCOMDTKEY AS FIELD1 ,TB2.ORDERCOMDTNM AS FIELD2
ORDER BY #{colName} DESC
ORDER BY #{colName} ASC
ORDER BY FIELD1 ASC
#{GRIDPAGING_ROWNUMTYPE_BOTTOM}

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TORDER_MST_EXTERN WHERE DELYN = 'N'
AND OWKEY = #{value}
/* oms-common-sql-oracle.xml - selectItemCodeListCount */ SELECT COUNT(1)

/* oms-common-sql-oracle.xml - selectItemCodeList */
SELECT IC.ICKEY AS FIELD1 , IC.ICNM AS FIELD2 , IC.OWKEY AS FIELD3 , IC.ICUNITKEY AS FIELD4 , IC.UDF2 AS FIELD5 /* 온도 */
/* oms-common-sql-oracle.xml - selectItemAsrtListCount */ SELECT COUNT(1)

/* oms-common-sql-oracle.xml - selectItemAsrtList */
SELECT IC.ICKEY AS FIELD1 , IC.ICNM AS FIELD2 , IC.OWKEY AS FIELD3 , IC.ICKEY AS FIELD4 , A.ASRTNM AS FIELD5 , IC.ICUNITKEY AS FIELD6 , AC.ACKEY , AC.ACNM
/* oms-common-sql-oracle.xml - selectItemAsrtRepListCount */ SELECT COUNT(1)

/* oms-common-sql-oracle.xml - selectItemAsrtRepList */
SELECT IC.ICKEY AS FIELD1 , IC.ICNM AS FIELD2 , IC.OWKEY AS FIELD3 , IC.ICUNITKEY AS FIELD4 , IC.UDF2 AS FIELD5 /* 온도 */ , EA.WEIGHT AS FIELD6 , EA.VOL AS FIELD7 , EA.ICUNITQTY AS FIELD8 , IC.ASRTYN AS FIELD9 , ASRT.ASRTREPKEY AS FIELD10 , REP.ICNM AS FIELD11 , AC.ACKEY , AC.ACNM , EA.ICUNITQTY AS EAUNITQTY , INN.ICUNITQTY AS INNUNITQTY , CTN.ICUNITQTY AS CTNUNITQTY

/* oms-common-sql-oracle.xml - selectTOrderMstOwOrTypeList */ SELECT TB.FIELD1 , TB.FIELD2 , TB.FIELD5 FROM ( SELECT CH.EXTORDERTYPECD AS FIELD1 , CH.EXTORDERTYPECD || ' : ' || EXTORDERTYPENM AS FIELD2 , CH.OWKEY AS FIELD5 FROM TORDER_INFO_CO_HD CH INNER JOIN TORDER_MST_EXTERN ME ON CH.OWKEY = ME.OWKEY AND CH.EXTORDERTYPECD = ME.EXTORDERTYPECD WHERE CH.OWKEY = #{owkey} ) TB GROUP BY TB.FIELD1, TB.FIELD2, TB.FIELD5 ORDER BY TB.FIELD1
/* oms-common-sql-oracle.xml - selectTOrderNameList */ SELECT 'A.RECPNM' AS FIELD1, '받는자명' AS FIELD2 UNION ALL SELECT 'A.BUYER', '주문자명' UNION ALL SELECT 'A.RECALLER', '회수 신청인명'

/* oms-common-sql-oracle.xml - selectTOrderInfoList */ SELECT 'A.RECPTEL01' AS FIELD1, '받는자 연락처1' AS FIELD2 UNION ALL SELECT 'A.RECPTEL02', '받는자 연락처2' UNION ALL SELECT 'A.RECPADDRHD||A.RECPADDRDT', '받는자 주소' UNION ALL SELECT 'A.RECPZIPCD', '받는자 우편번호' UNION ALL SELECT 'A.BUYERTEL01' AS FIELD1, '주문자 연락처1' AS FIELD2 UNION ALL SELECT 'A.BUYERTEL02', '주문자 연락처2' UNION ALL SELECT 'A.BUYERADDRHD||A.BUYERADDRDT', '주문자 주소' UNION ALL SELECT 'A.BUYERZIPCD', '주문자 우편번호' UNION ALL SELECT 'A.RECALLERTEL01' AS FIELD1, '회수지 연락처1' AS FIELD2 UNION ALL SELECT 'A.RECALLERTEL02', '회수지 연락처2' UNION ALL SELECT 'A.RECALLERADDRHD||A.RECALLERADDRDT', '회수지 주소' UNION ALL SELECT 'A.RECALLERZIPCD', '회수지 우편번호'
/* oms-common-sql-oracle.xml - selectCoItemCodeListCount */ SELECT COUNT(1)

/* oms-common-sql-oracle.xml - selectCoItemCodeList */
SELECT IC.ICKEY AS FIELD1 , IC.ICNM AS FIELD2 , IC.OWKEY AS FIELD3 , IC.ICUNITKEY AS FIELD4 , IC.UDF2 AS FIELD5 /* 온도 */ , EA.WEIGHT AS FIELD6 , EA.VOL AS FIELD7 , EA.ICUNITQTY AS FIELD8 , IC.ASRTYN AS FIELD9 , ASRT.ASRTREPKEY AS FIELD10 , REP.ICNM AS FIELD11 , AC.ACKEY , AC.ACNM , EA.ICUNITQTY AS EAUNITQTY , INN.ICUNITQTY AS INNUNITQTY , CTN.ICUNITQTY AS CTNUNITQTY
/* oms-common-sql-oracle.xml - selectCoOrgItemCodeListCount */ SELECT COUNT(1)

/* oms-common-sql-oracle.xml - selectCoOrgItemCodeList */
SELECT IC.ICKEY AS FIELD1 , IC.ICNM AS FIELD2 , IC.OWKEY AS FIELD3 , IC.ICUNITKEY AS FIELD4 , IC.UDF2 AS FIELD5 /* 온도 */ , EA.WEIGHT AS FIELD6 , EA.VOL AS FIELD7 , EA.ICUNITQTY AS FIELD8 , IC.ASRTYN AS FIELD9 , AC.ACKEY AS FIELD10 , AC.ACNM AS FIELD11 , EA.ICUNITQTY AS EAUNITQTY , INN.ICUNITQTY AS INNUNITQTY , CTN.ICUNITQTY AS CTNUNITQTY
mapper.sql: FROM TORDER_MST_COM_HD A WHERE A.DELYN = 'N' AND (A.COMHDKEY LIKE '%' || #{value} || '%' OR A.COMHDNM LIKE '%' || #{value} || '%')
mapper.select: /* oms-common-sql-oracle.xml - selectTorderMstComCount */ SELECT COUNT(1)

choose.otherwise: AND ( T.FIELD1 LIKE '%' || #{value} || '%' OR T.FIELD2 LIKE '%' || #{value} || '%' )

mapper.select: /* oms-common-sql-oracle.xml - selectTOrderMstAdcdUnionCount */ SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ( SELECT B.ADCDDTKEY AS FIELD1 , B.ADCDDTNM AS FIELD2 FROM TADMIN_MST_ADCD_HD A INNER JOIN TADMIN_MST_ADCD_DT B ON B.ADCDHDKEY = A.ADCDHDKEY WHERE A.DELYN = 'N' AND B.DELYN = 'N' AND A.ADCDHDKEY = 'CTGLEVEL' AND B.LAKEY = 'KOR' AND A.ADCDHDKEY = 'CTGLEVEL' ) T

/* oms-common-sql-oracle.xml - selectTOrderMstAdcdUnion */
SELECT T.FIELD1 , T.FIELD2 , T.FIELD3 , T.FIELD4 , T.FIELD5 FROM (SELECT B.ADCDDTKEY AS FIELD1 , B.ADCDDTNM AS FIELD2 , B.ADCDDTVALUE AS FIELD3 , A.ADCDHDKEY AS FIELD4 , B.ADCDDTORDER AS FIELD5 FROM TADMIN_MST_ADCD_HD A INNER JOIN TADMIN_MST_ADCD_DT B ON B.ADCDHDKEY = A.ADCDHDKEY WHERE A.DELYN = 'N' AND B.DELYN = 'N' AND A.ADCDHDKEY = 'CTGLEVEL' AND B.LAKEY = 'KOR') T

/* oms-common-sql-oracle.xml - selectTOrderCtgDivCount */ SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ( SELECT COMHDKEY AS FIELD1 , COMHDNM AS FIELD2 , (CASE WHEN COMHDKEY = 'DIV_MAX' THEN '1' WHEN COMHDKEY = 'DIV_MID' THEN '2' WHEN COMHDKEY = 'DIV_MIN' THEN '3' ELSE '' END) AS FIELD3 FROM TORDER_MST_COM_HD WHERE 1 = 1 AND COMHDKEY IN ('DIV_MAX', 'DIV_MID', 'DIV_MIN') ) T

/* oms-common-sql-oracle.xml - selectTOrderrCtgDiv */
SELECT T.FIELD1 , T.FIELD2 , T.FIELD3 FROM ( SELECT (CASE WHEN COMHDKEY = 'DIV_MAX' THEN '1' WHEN COMHDKEY = 'DIV_MID' THEN '2' WHEN COMHDKEY = 'DIV_MIN' THEN '3' ELSE '' END) AS FIELD1 , COMHDNM AS FIELD2 , COMHDKEY AS FIELD3 FROM TORDER_MST_COM_HD WHERE 1 = 1 AND COMHDKEY IN ('DIV_MAX', 'DIV_MID', 'DIV_MIN') ) T
/* oms-common-sql-oracle.xml - selectTorderMstDlvryCount */ SELECT COUNT(1)
mapper.sql: FROM TORDER_MST_COM_DT WHERE 1 = 1 AND COMHDKEY = 'DLVRY' AND DELYN = 'N'
FROM TORDER_MST_AC A WHERE A.DELYN = 'N' AND (A.ACKEY LIKE '%' || #{value} || '%' OR A.ACNM LIKE '%' || #{value} || '%')
mapper.select: /* oms-common-sql-oracle.xml - selectTorderMstAcCount */ SELECT COUNT(1)
mapper.sql: FROM TORDER_MST_ORCD_HD TB1 INNER JOIN TORDER_MST_ORCD_DT TB2 ON TB1.ORDERCOMHDKEY = TB2.ORDERCOMHDKEY WHERE TB1.DELYN = 'N'
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1)
SELECT ACKEY FIELD1 ,ACNM FIELD2 ,OWKEY FIELD3

/* oms-common-sql-oracle.xml - selectTAdminMstCtgCount */ SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT CTGKEY , CTGNM
)

/* oms-common-sql-oracle.xml - selectTAdminMstCtg */
SELECT DISTINCT CTGKEY AS FIELD1 , CTGNM AS FIELD2
mapper.sql:
FROM TORDER_MST_CTG A INNER JOIN TORDER_MST_CTG B ON A.OWKEY = B.OWKEY AND A.CTGKEY = B.UPPERCTGKEY AND A.CTGLV + 1 = B.CTGLV INNER JOIN TORDER_MST_CTG C ON B.OWKEY = C.OWKEY AND B.CTGKEY = C.UPPERCTGKEY AND B.CTGLV + 1 = C.CTGLV WHERE A.CLOSDATE >= #{sysdate} AND A.DELYN = 'N'
AND (C.CTGKEY LIKE '%' || #{value} || '%' OR C.CTGNM LIKE '%'|| #{value} || '%' )
AND A.OWKEY IN
#{OWKEY_SELECTION_VALUE}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1)
SELECT A.CTGKEY AS FIELD1 , A.CTGNM AS FIELD2 , B.CTGKEY AS FIELD3 , B.CTGNM AS FIELD4 , C.CTGKEY AS FIELD5 , C.CTGNM AS FIELD6
SELECT COUNT(1)
SELECT A.ICKEY AS FIELD1 , A.ICNM AS FIELD2
